title: persona-atoms v1 voice-profile atom
description: Sentence-level voice characteristics for a persona: formality register, hedging tolerance, sentence-length preference, and lexical domain. These parameters govern the surface form of generated text without constraining its content.

id.description: URL-safe slug; unique within the voice-profile atom type.

formality.description: Overall register. 'formal' uses elevated diction and avoids contractions. 'informal' uses colloquialisms freely.

hedging_tolerance.description: How much epistemic hedging ('might', 'could', 'arguably') is acceptable. Low = make direct claims; High = surface uncertainty explicitly.

sentence_length_preference.description: Preferred sentence length. 'varied' allows the writer to mix for rhythm.

vocabulary_domain.description: Lexical domains the voice draws from (e.g. 'engineering', 'academic', 'conversational').

avoids.description: Phrases, constructions, or patterns this voice profile explicitly avoids.

vendors.description: LLM families this voice profile is known to work well with.
